name: CODENS: Transforming Code Changes into Living, Accessible, and Queryable Documentation

description: arXiv:2607.18356v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Maintaining up-to-date code documentation is difficult in fast-moving repositories because design knowledge is scattered across source files and pull requests. We present CODENS , a system that turns pull requests into living, accessible, and queryable documentation for production codebases. CODENS incrementally builds a typed software knowledge...
author: Abdelhak Kelious, Chyrine Tahri, Eliot Bardet
